risk_title: Political and Governance Instability Affecting Project Implementation
risk_summary: Political and governance risks are rated as Substantial, indicating significant fragility in the political environment that could undermine project implementation and sustainability of education system improvements.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Political and Governance - Proposed Rating: Substantial

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Constraints in Fragile Context
risk_summary: Institutional capacity for implementation and sustainability is rated as Substantial risk, suggesting weak government institutions may struggle to execute and sustain project activities, particularly relevant in a fragile state context.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability - Proposed Rating: Substantial

risk_title: Delayed Implementation of Critical Education Access Components
risk_summary: Key components supporting out-of-school children (OOSC) and foundational learning are experiencing delays, with back-to-school incentives delayed due to fund unavailability and accelerated curriculum not yet initiated, potentially exacerbating vulnerability of marginalized populations.
evidence_quote: Delayed due to non-availability of funds for EAA. No accelerated primary school curriculum available... Not initiated.

risk_title: Governance Accountability Gaps in School Management
risk_summary: Low completion rates in gender-based violence prevention training and grievance resolution (only 28.2% of 1,365 complaints resolved) indicate governance and accountability weaknesses that could affect protection of vulnerable students and community trust in education institutions.
evidence_quote: Number of SMC and Board of Governor members and teachers trained in gender in education (gender sensitization, GBV prevention and awareness): 0.00... 1,365 complaints received, 385 resolved.
